claim_boundary: Regulatory Phase 5 creates a gap analysis only. It does not claim certification, compliance, government approval, procurement approval, legal sufficiency, financial/tax approval, production monitoring, professional audit, or truth validation.
largest_current_gaps: No formal certification or conformity assessment exists.
No ISO/IEC 42001 or equivalent management-system audit exists.
No formal security questionnaire/access-control packet exists.
No adopted lawyer-reviewed policies or customer contract terms exist.
No professional compliance, tax, accounting, valuation, or legal opinion exists.
safe_overall_claim: SpecShift has meaningful internal readiness scaffolding and evidence inventory. It is not certified, compliant, government-approved, procurement-approved, or professionally audited.
